title: alyssum fragillimum
intro: Alyssum fragillimum, also known as sweet alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its delicate white blooms and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and volatile oils. The health benefits of alyssum fragillimum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Alyssum fragillimum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
